title: Tesla held talks about taking a stake in Glencore according to the Financial Times
text: Electric vehicles giant Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) held talks with the FTSE 100 listed Glencore PLC (LSE:GLEN) about taking a stake in the mining and commodities group, according to a report in the Financial Times. Citing sources familiar with the matter, the FT said Tesla discussed buying 10% to 20% of Glencore last year and continued negotiations in March this year, when the Swiss firm's chief executive Gary Nagle visited the carmaker's factory in Fremont, California.

title: Tesla Cyberquad ATV recalled after failure to comply with federal safety standards

The recall affects about 5,000 units of the model number 914, which have both the Tesla "T" and Radio Flyer logos printed on the batteries, and were sold exclusively online at "shop.tesla.com" in December 2021 for $1,900, according to the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission's website.
